chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-82 of 2025 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For orders on M.A No.366/2025 2. For orders on office objections 3. For orders on M.A No.367/2025 4. For hearing on main case 26.02.2025 Mr. Nabi Bux Narejo, advocate for the petitioner *********** 1. Urgency stands disposed of. 2to4. Through this petition, petitioners are seeking directions against the respondents so as to change Foti Khata. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Additional A.G Sindh, present in Court in some other matters, waives the notice and submits that in this regard a Grievance Redressal Committee, under the chairmanship of Deputy Commissioner of District concerned, has been notified vide Notification dated 24.11.2024, therefore, petitioners may approach the said Committee for decision in accordance with law. On being confronted with such position, counsel for the petitioners seeks disposal of the petition, leaving the petitioners at liberty to approach the Committee, referred to above. In view of the above, instant petition is disposed of, leaving the petitioners at liberty to approach the Grievance Redressal Committee, referred to above, by filing a proper application. In case the petitioners file such application, the Deputy Commissioner Mirpurkhas, being head of the Committee, shall decide the same within 30 days strictly in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E
